meaning: queen's rook (国际象棋中的)后翼车  四分之一,一刻钟,季度 qr(quarter)
examples: We can pay money by scanning QR codes in many shops.
She asked her students to hand in their homework through a QR code.
Visitors must show their health QR codes and check their temperature before they go into the museum.
Rio de Janeiro is adding something new into its trademark black-and-white mosaic pavements: QR codes.
While practicality is the key to QR success, it never hurts to get a little creative.
